title: Made in Italy
writer: Ruggero Maccari, Ettore Scola, Nanni Loy
actors: Renzo Marignano, Claudio Gora, Marina Berti
plot: A group of Italians--tourists and immigrants--take a flight to Sweden. Two bourgeois couples choose a typical Italian restaurant by its name, 'La Trattoria', and are disgusted by the untidiness and poor service. An elegant lady in...
